name: koine-demo
description: Remotion source for the Koine README demo — one .koi model compiling to many targets.

scripts.render:gif: npm run render && ffmpeg -y -i out/koine-demo.mp4 -vf "fps=15,scale=960:540:flags=lanczos,split[s0][s1];[s0]palettegen=max_colors=128[p];[s1][p]paletteuse=dither=none" -loop 0 out/koine-demo.gif
